mapper.select: SELECT id , trip_id , file_path , taken_at , width , height , size_bytes FROM photos WHERE trip_id = #{trip_id} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO photos ( trip_id, file_path, file_name, taken_at, width, height, size_bytes ) VALUES ( #{trip_id}, #{file_path}, #{file_name}, #{taken_at}, #{width}, #{height}, #{size_bytes} )
